message:

 {"id":"bd-jpwu","title":"Use manifest installed_check/verify for detection + readiness","description":"Goal:
- Use ACFS manifest installed_check/verify to drive detection and readiness rather than hardcoded command -v checks.

Scope:
- Support installed_check.run_as and command fields.
- Safely execute checks with timeouts and output caps.
- Fallback to command -v only if manifest does not provide checks.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit/integration: bd-1rdc (parsing + detection), bd-1kkl (fallback/refresh paths).

Definition of Done:
- Detection reflects manifest checks and yields consistent availability results.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:47:55.868092017Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:32:02.444069096Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","detection","integration","registry"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-jpwu","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:47:56.116970571Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-jpwu","depends_on_id":"bd-1sz8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:23.676567772Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-jpwu","depends_on_id":"bd-2k5b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:06:42.197900991Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-jpwu","depends_on_id":"bd-ka28","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:21.677929866Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-ka28","title":"Implement ACFS manifest loader (YAML + validation + caching)","description":"Goal:
- Implement a manifest loader that parses YAML, validates schema, and supports env overrides.

Scope:
- Local file path (default) with optional override via env.
- Zod validation with helpful error messages.
- Caching with TTL to avoid repeated disk reads.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit: bd-6huy (cache/TTL/error mapping), bd-1kkl (fallback/refresh/provenance coverage).

Definition of Done:
- Loader returns typed ToolRegistry with errors surfaced via gateway error mapping.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:39.054308176Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T07:23:07.241717216Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T07:23:07.241470371Z","close_reason":"Implemented ACFS manifest loader with YAML parse, zod validation, TTL cache","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","integration","registry"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ka28","depends_on_id":"bd-14cg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:21.595781695Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-ka28","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:39.077297653Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-ka28","depends_on_id":"bd-2k5b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:06:26.713374435Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
